source_description: In an apartment living room featuring an armchair and a doorway, Joey sits in the armchair with his hands on his legs. Chandler, off-screen, says, "But the stops are all the same. Bittertown"
Joey maintains his seated position, his gaze directed slightly to the left.
Chandler, still off-screen, continues, "Aloneville. Hermit Junction." Joey remains seated, looking up.
Chandler, still off-screen, continues, "Aloneville. Hermit Junction." Joey remains seated, looking up.
Joey places his hands on his thighs and pushes himself up from the chair.
Standing up, Joey gestures with his right hand and says, "All right, you know what we got to do? We got to get you out of here. Come on, I'll buy you breakfast."
Standing up, Joey gestures with his right hand and says, "All right, you know what we got to do? We got to get you out of here. Come on, I'll buy you breakfast."
